Index

A C G I S U W 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

Attachable - Interface in io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
This Attachable interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, provide the attachment storage ability.
AttachableDelegate - Class in io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils
A simple Attachable delegate implementation.
AttachableDelegate() - Constructor for class io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils.AttachableDelegate
 

C

check(W, Predicate<? super W>) - Static method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Wrapper
Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain satisfy predicate.

G

getAttachment(String) - Method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Attachable
Get the attachment of the given key.
getAttachment(String) - Method in class io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils.AttachableDelegate
 
getAttachment(W, String) - Static method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Wrapper
Retrieves the attachment of wrapper of given key on the wrapper chain by calling Attachable.getAttachment(String).

I

io.foldright.inspectablewrappers - package io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
🪐 Inspectable Wrappers Specification provides a standard for wrapper chain with inspection ability.
io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils - package io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils
Utils classes for inspectable wrappers.
isInstanceOf(W, Class<?>) - Static method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Wrapper
Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain matches the given type.

S

setAttachment(String, Object) - Method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Attachable
Sets an attachment.
setAttachment(String, Object) - Method in class io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.utils.AttachableDelegate
 

U

unwrap() - Method in interface io.foldright.inspectablewrappers.Wrapper
Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.

W

Wrapper<T> - Interface in io.foldright.inspectablewrappers
This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make wrapper instances as an inspectable wrapper chain(linked list).
